encounter.location: UI Health Ambulatory TB Clinic (telephone), 1801 W Taylor St, Suite 1E, Chicago, IL 60612

document_references.description: Documents Dr. Okafor's phone call with Robert Davis to discuss the negative sputum mycobacterial culture result from the February 5 specimen. Includes discussion of significance (first of two negative cultures needed for conversion), current medication continuation (RIPE regimen unchanged), and plan to await March 5 culture result with next in-person visit on March 19.

diagnostic_reports.description: Sputum mycobacterial culture (specimen collected 2026-02-05) returned negative — no growth of Mycobacterium tuberculosis after 42 days of incubation. This is the first of two consecutive negative cultures needed to document sputum culture conversion.
